message:
chore(beads): flush post-ZMPOP/PSYNC2/fuzz-targets task updates

Syncs beads SQLite to JSONL after the ZADD/ZMPOP wire-parity fix,
PSYNC2 CONTINUE-suffix fix, three new fuzz targets
(fuzz_lua_eval / fuzz_psync_reply / fuzz_tls_config), proptest
cleanups, and the live INFO contract harness landed in this cluster.
Pure `br sync --flush-only` output.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
